title: Lead Investment Banker at Piramal Finance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Piramal Finance
jsonLd.description:
Piramal Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Piramal Finance:
Piramal Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Finance!
